rows.description: Recd of mr Verman Increments for Bapt. 1709
rows.notes: Description and amounts (33/7/5) confirmed by both and visual verification. The 'q' symbol after the pence, indicating a farthing (0.25), is clearly visible in the image, as correctly identified by gemini-flash.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Mr Thomas Saltyen, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: Recd of Jonathan Raymon Esqz for the Land he hath in by his hands mr Withycombe in Devon, given the college by Dr Mitchel I say rscd Sept. 17. 1709
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash confirmed visually for details like 'Esqz', 'by his hands mr', and 'rscd'. Amounts (10/0/0) confirmed by both and visual inspection. Both correctly identified the multi-line nature of the entry.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Jonathan Raymond Esq. for land in Devon held by Mr Withycombe; land was given to the college by Dr Mitchell (receipt dated Sept 17, 1709).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Jonathan Raymond Esq. for land in Devon (held by Mr Withycombe) from Dr Mitchell's bequest, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Recd of Jonathan Ray mond Esq. in pt of rent for Withycombe being Dr Michells legacy to Be distributed among poor Scholars (crossed out)
rows.notes: Description is a multi-line, heavily crossed-out entry. gpt-5-mini correctly noted its struck-out nature and illegibility, leading to lower confidence. gemini-flash claimed it was clear, which is incorrect. A best effort transcription is provided, acknowledging the difficult reading due to the strike-through.
rows.english_description: Receipt in part of rent from Jonathan Raymond Esq. for Withycombe (Dr Mitchell's legacy intended to be distributed among poor scholars); entry has been crossed out.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt in part of rent from Jonathan Raymond Esq. for Withycombe intended for distribution among poor scholars (no amount recorded).
